uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

Group.title: Group
Group.description: A group of people splitting expenses.

id.description: The unique ID of the group.

creatorId.description: The UID of the user who created the group.

memberIds.description: The UIDs of the members in the group.

memberNames.description: Map of UID to custom display name within the group.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: An expense added to a group.

id.description: The unique ID of the expense.

groupId.description: The ID of the group this expense belongs to.

payerId.description: The UID of the user who paid.

splitWithIds.description: The UIDs of the users splitting the expense.
